'''Drendan''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturing corporation. They created the [[Load-lifter (model)|Load-lifter]], a bulky droid designed for heavy lifting duties.

==Appearances==
*{{FFG|story=Debts to Pay|book=Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Game Master's Kit|text=''Star Wars'': Edge of the Empire Game Master's Kit}} {{Mo}}
